description_long: This object is a heavy, belt-fed automatic rifle or machine gun, featuring a robust cylindrical barrel and a prominent ammunition belt draped along its side. The main body is constructed from dark metal, with two wooden handles at the rear for grip and control. The barrel is long and thick, suggesting it is designed for sustained fire, and the presence of a circular sight at the top indicates it is intended for precise aiming. Several spent cartridges are visible, emphasizing its function as a rapid-fire weapon. The overall design is utilitarian, with exposed mechanical components and a rugged, industrial finish. This weapon is suitable for deployment in urban environments where heavy firepower may be required.
description: A heavy, belt-fed automatic rifle with a long barrel, wooden handles, and a visible ammunition belt, designed for sustained fire and precision aiming.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular sight, dual wooden handles, and the ammunition belt hanging to the side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the barrel, the full extent of the ammunition belt, and the mechanical details of the receiver.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the wooden handles, the sight, and the spent cartridges ejected to the side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the barrel, ammunition belt, and the overall robust construction.
